title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Niva Bupa South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Niva Bupa South Asia Partners:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners!
